---
title: "Contact & References"
---

## Get in Touch

I'd love to connect! You can reach me through any of the following:

| Platform | Link |
|----------|------|
| 📧 Email | your@email.com |
| 💼 LinkedIn | [Meghana](https://linkedin.com/in/YOUR_PROFILE) |
| 🐙 GitHub | [YOUR_USERNAME](https://github.com/YOUR_USERNAME) |

## References

Available upon request.
